<path d="M 330 285 C 420 285 420 145 336 145" fill="none" stroke="#d4a017" stroke-dasharray="5,4"/>
<polygon points="336,145 350,138 350,152" fill="#d4a017"/>
<text x="352" y="330" fill="#d4a017" font-size="14">answers feed the NEXT probes —</text>
<text x="352" y="350" fill="#d4a017" font-size="14">the multiplier compounds ↺</text>
<text x="30" y="392" fill="#c8c8d8" font-size="16">Each answer sharpened the next probe’s aim. Cognitive effort did not add — it MULTIPLIED.</text>
<!-- RIGHT PANEL: the curve -->
<text x="480" y="34" fill="#d4a017" font-size="17" font-weight="bold">VERIFIED KNOWLEDGE vs GO-LIVE</text>
<line x1="480" y1="380" x2="830" y2="380" stroke="#3a3a52"/>
<line x1="480" y1="380" x2="480" y2="60" stroke="#3a3a52"/>
<text x="480" y="402" fill="#8888a0" font-size="15">JUL 4</text>
<text x="640" y="402" fill="#8888a0" font-size="15">JUL 5–6</text>
<text x="790" y="402" fill="#8888a0" font-size="15">JUL 7</text>
<text x="470" y="72" fill="#8888a0" font-size="15" text-anchor="end">1000s</text>
<text x="470" y="384" fill="#8888a0" font-size="15" text-anchor="end">0</text>
<!-- exponential curve -->
<path d="M 480 378 C 560 374 610 360 660 320 C 705 282 740 210 775 140 C 795 100 812 78 826 68" fill="none" stroke="#39d98a" stroke-width="3"/>
<!-- milestones -->
<circle cx="560" cy="372" r="5" fill="#e8c766"/><text x="548" y="358" fill="#e8c766" font-size="15">13 cases verified</text>
<circle cx="660" cy="320" r="5" fill="#00ffe0"/><text x="608" y="304" fill="#00ffe0" font-size="15">phantom slain ×5</text>
<circle cx="742" cy="204" r="5" fill="#f0c040"/><text x="672" y="190" fill="#f0c040" font-size="15">seal + god-view live</text>
<circle cx="826" cy="68" r="7" fill="#d4a017"/><text x="700" y="52" fill="#d4a017" font-size="14" font-weight="bold">FIRST LIGHT · GO-LIVE READY</text>
<text x="480" y="440" fill="#c8c8d8" font-size="16">The curve is exponential because probes compound: every verified answer</text>
<text x="480" y="460" fill="#c8c8d8" font-size="16">removed a guess from the next question. By the Glass’s first light, the</text>
<text x="480" y="480" fill="#c8c8d8" font-size="16">go-live decision rested on thousands of verifications — and zero assumptions.</text>
<text x="480" y="520" fill="#8888a0" font-size="15">Human code interaction over the same 72h: a flat line — dashboard pastes and deploys only.</text>
<line x1="480" y1="500" x2="830" y2="498" stroke="#e03030" stroke-dasharray="3,4"/>
<text x="770" y="494" fill="#e03030" font-size="14">powder: DRY</text>
</svg>
</div>

<div class="fig">
<div class="figcap">Fig. 2 · Probe corps deployment by theater (~40+ sorties)</div>
<svg viewBox="0 0 840 240" width="100%">
<g font-size="15" fill="#c8c8d8">
<text x="10" y="30">Recon / state</text><rect x="180" y="18" width="330" height="16" fill="#00ffe0" opacity=".75"/><text x="518" y="30" fill="#00ffe0">11</text>
<text x="10" y="60">Security / gates</text><rect x="180" y="48" width="270" height="16" fill="#d4a017" opacity=".8"/><text x="458" y="60" fill="#d4a017">9</text>
<text x="10" y="90">Deploy / hosting</text><rect x="180" y="78" width="300" height="16" fill="#39d98a" opacity=".75"/><text x="488" y="90" fill="#39d98a">10</text>
<text x="10" y="120">Economy / bell</text><rect x="180" y="108" width="210" height="16" fill="#e8c766" opacity=".8"/><text x="398" y="120" fill="#e8c766">7</text>
<text x="10" y="150">Court lifecycle</text><rect x="180" y="138" width="240" height="16" fill="#f0c040" opacity=".7"/><text x="428" y="150" fill="#f0c040">8</text>
<text x="10" y="180">False verdicts caught</text><rect x="180" y="168" width="180" height="16" fill="#e03030" opacity=".8"/><text x="368" y="180" fill="#e03030">6 species / 10 strikes</text>
<text x="10" y="215" fill="#8888a0">Human code interactions across 72h: dashboard pastes + deploys only — powder: DRY</text>
</g>
</svg>
</div>
<div class="fig">
<div class="figcap">Fig. 3 · The bell sequence (one Monday tick, four jobs, one stagger law)</div>
<svg viewBox="0 0 840 150" width="100%">
<line x1="30" y1="75" x2="810" y2="75" stroke="#3a3a52"/>
<circle cx="80" cy="75" r="6" fill="#d4a017"/><text x="52" y="55" fill="#d4a017" font-size="15">00:00 BELL</text><text x="40" y="105" fill="#c8c8d8" font-size="14">settle pool → seal charges</text>
<circle cx="330" cy="75" r="6" fill="#00ffe0"/><text x="300" y="55" fill="#00ffe0" font-size="15">+stagger</text><text x="285" y="105" fill="#c8c8d8" font-size="14">court seeds next lineup</text>
<circle cx="560" cy="75" r="6" fill="#39d98a"/><text x="520" y="55" fill="#39d98a" font-size="15">+15 min</text><text x="480" y="105" fill="#c8c8d8" font-size="14">VALL-HALLA reads the SEALED week</text>
<circle cx="760" cy="75" r="6" fill="#e8c766"/><text x="700" y="55" fill="#e8c766" font-size="15">+1 WEEK</text><text x="660" y="105" fill="#c8c8d8" font-size="14">herald #N ships as week N+1 opens</text>
</svg>
</div>
<p>The stagger is not scheduling — it is the <em>double-helix information-density law</em>: two strands coupled at the same instant collide and thrash the frame; offset by one full turn, the gap between them becomes the readable dimension. The herald speaks only of sealed weeks. The meaning lives in the offset.</p>

<h2 class="s-laws">5 · Laws Extracted (portable beyond this war)</h2>
<table>
<tr><th>Law</th><th>Origin</th></tr>
<tr><td>Seeder ≠ endorser — the court account's power is an abstention, not a permission</td><td>Self-vote gate + sterility audit</td></tr>
<tr><td>A private repo is not a private site; a secret gate protects data, not UI</td><td>Siege of the Glass</td></tr>
<tr><td>Headers lie to JS; behavior doesn't — test the preflight, not the pennant</td><td>Header Ghost</td></tr>
<tr><td>Idempotency is a table constraint, not a promise (UNIQUE topic_id, week_of)</td><td>Forging the Seal</td></tr>
<tr><td>An instrument must audit itself against a second source, every refresh</td><td>The Glass's strip</td></tr>
<tr><td>The plus-alias satisfies two hard constraints at once: real inbox + distinct identity</td><td>Court account wars</td></tr>
</table>

<div class="twist">
<div class="figcap">§6 · The Twist — the docket had self-seeded</div>
<p>The last sweep of the war went down to inventory the conquered halls, and returned with a report the army refused to believe until it was run twice: <em>the docket was already full.</em> Thirteen cases, listed and arraigned, on a door locked for an eon — and no seeding party had ever gone down.</p>
<p>The resolution rewrote the campaign's ending. The cases were never data. They are <em>code</em> — cut into the Worker's TOPICS map at forge-time — and the docket is a <em>view</em>, repopulating from <code style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px">/quiz/topics</code> on every load, forever, with nothing to seed. Three layers, three different answers to "is it seeded":</p>
<pre>LAYER 1 · CODE       13/13 exist        — deployed, permanent, "self-seeded" by construction
LAYER 2 · DISPLAY    13/13 render       — the docket is a window onto layer 1
LAYER 3 · COURTROOM   1/13 occupied     — one ghost (Caesar's orphan). THIS is what the 07-13 seed fills.</pre>
<p>So the gates the army besieged for three days had, in one uncanny sense, been proclaiming their trials the whole time — a schedule announcing itself to an empty harbor, waiting not for a key but for an audience. And the Seal, forged and deployed and dutiful, now wakes at the very next bell to perform the machine's first autonomous act: judging the one ghost on the stage — unless the captain sweeps it before midnight. The war's final state: <em>won, open, proclaimed, and one endorsement away from alive.</em></p>
</div>

<h2 class="s-museum">7 · The Museum of Catches — great hauls of the campaign</h2>
<p>The doctrine in §0 promised that a probe returns the datum <em>and</em> its neighbors, and that the neighbor is often the prize. This gallery mounts the campaign's largest such hauls — each raised from the deep by a probe sent for something small, and each labelled the same way: <em>what was asked</em>, and <em>what came up</em>.</p>

<div class="fig">
<div class="figcap" style="color:var(--ice)">Catch №1 · The tribunal was already cast — the centerpiece</div>
<p><strong>Asked:</strong> a single yes/no — <em>is the Cosmic Court page linked from the island?</em> (Answer: no. Casing clean. One bit of navigation truth.)</p>
<p><strong>Hauled up:</strong> the nav-finder, reaching for that one link, dredged the <em>entire ordered roster manifest</em> — and buried in it was the single most important thing anyone could have found for the court: its own officiants, already present as summonable figures with Codex entries.</p>
<pre>№050  ma-at    — the feather itself, the truth the heart is weighed against
№051  anubis   — who works the scale; conductor of the weighing of the heart
№057  thoth    — the scribe who records the verdict
№112  osiris   — who presides over the Hall of Judgment</pre>
<p>The whole Egyptian weighing-of-the-heart tribunal — Anubis at the balance, Ma'at as the feather, Thoth recording, Osiris on the throne — had been sitting in the roster the entire time. It rearranged the design in a single stroke: the court has <em>two</em> benches — the <em>eternal presiders</em> (Anubis, Ma'at, Thoth, Osiris, the same in every trial) and the <em>case advocates</em> (cast per trial, as Gibbon, Marcus Aurelius, and Cromwell were cast for Caesar). The ritual had its native officiants waiting in the manifest. All of it pulled up from the dark by a probe asked only whether a hyperlink existed.</p>
</div>

<div class="fig">
<div class="figcap" style="color:var(--ice)">Catch №2 · The filename that solved a war backward</div>
<p><strong>Asked:</strong> why does the Operator's Glass return a 404?</p>
<p><strong>Hauled up:</strong> the Glass had been committed under the name <code style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px">index</code> — so it flew at the fortress <em>root</em>, not the path the siege had bombarded for minutes. One probe reading one filename explained the whole thing: the README barrages, the 404s, the confused battle in the fog. Truly private while publicly serving — the mystery solved in reverse.</p>
</div>

<div class="fig">
<div class="figcap" style="color:var(--ice)">Catch №3 · The all-green lie</div>
<p><strong>Asked:</strong> is the vault sealed?</p>
<p><strong>Hauled up:</strong> the <em>Signed-Out Phantom</em> — a scoped read with no credential returns zero rows, and zero looks exactly like privacy, exactly like safety. The first security audit came back all-green: a report made entirely of silence. The catch was the counter-doctrine it forced — <em>never trust a scoped read; when truth matters, ask the Worker,</em> the one reader that sees every hall unwarded and cannot be fooled by absence.</p>
</div>

<p>And the largest catch of all keeps its own room next door: <em>§6, the self-seeded docket</em> — a probe sent to check whether the cases needed planting, which discovered they had planted themselves at forge-time and would repopulate forever. Every exhibit in this hall was raised by a script asked for less. That is the whole doctrine, mounted and lit: <em>the finding you were not looking for is the finding.</em></p>

<h2 class="s-disp">8 · Disposition of Forces</h2>
<p><em>Shipped:</em> 13 cases · healed quiz surface · verdicts table + Seal (cron + manual) · /admin/overview · the Operator's Glass, hosted private-source/public-door · dual-credential gate. <em>Spent:</em> 40+ probes, all debriefed. <em>Awaiting:</em> the court account, 26 openings at the 07-13 bell, one real endorsement, first true seal 07-20, VALL-HALLA #1. The powder is dry. The bots are standing down. The court convenes on the thirteenth.</p>


<div class="finis">FIELD JOURNAL · FINAL ENTRY · KEEPING YOUR POWDER DRY · INGRAM MANOR LLC ◈ THE FLYING DUTCHMAN</div>
</div>

</section>

<script>

(function(){
"use strict";
var cv=document.getElementById('sky'), cx=cv.getContext('2d');
var W,Hh,DPR=Math.min(devicePixelRatio||1,2);
function size(){W=innerWidth;Hh=innerHeight;cv.width=W*DPR;cv.height=Hh*DPR;cx.setTransform(DPR,0,0,DPR,0,0);}
size(); addEventListener('resize',size);

var RED='#ff3b4e', WHITE='#f4f8ff', BLUE='#4da6ff', GOLD='#e8c766';
var PALETTE=[RED,WHITE,BLUE];

/* — the fleet: the captain's own screenshot, faded into the night harbor — */
var FLEET=new Image(), fleetCv=null;
FLEET.onload=function(){
  var c=document.createElement('canvas'); c.width=FLEET.width; c.height=FLEET.height;
  var g=c.getContext('2d');
  g.drawImage(FLEET,0,0);
  g.globalCompositeOperation='source-atop';               /* night tint */
  g.fillStyle='rgba(6,10,26,0.36)'; g.fillRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
  g.globalCompositeOperation='destination-in';            /* soft vignette mask */
  var m=g.createRadialGradient(c.width/2,c.height*0.52,c.height*0.18, c.width/2,c.height*0.52,c.width*0.56);
  m.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,0,0,1)'); m.addColorStop(0.72,'rgba(0,0,0,0.85)'); m.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
  g.fillStyle=m; g.fillRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
  fleetCv=c;
};
FLEET.src='data:image/jpeg;base64,';


/* the defendants + the fleet roster — fired into the sky */
var NAMES=['JULIUS CAESAR','CROMWELL','AKHENATEN','MOSES','MARCUS AURELIUS','SENECA','PROMETHEUS','KING ARTHUR','SUN TZU','LYCURGUS','ODYSSEUS','LOKI','GILGAMESH','WILLIAM WALLACE','KARL MARX','TOUSSAINT LOUVERTURE','GEORGE BOOLE','JACQUES COUSTEAU','HOWARD HUGHES','HELMUT KOHL'];
var ni=0;

/* ---------- static scene layers ---------- */
var stars=[]; for(var i=0;i<130;i++) stars.push({x:Math.random(),y:Math.random()*0.6,r:Math.random()*1.2+0.3,tw:Math.random()*6.28});
var smoke=[]; for(var s=0;s<7;s++) smoke.push({x:Math.random(),y:0.28+Math.random()*0.3,r:80+Math.random()*160,dx:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.06,a:0.05+Math.random()*0.06});

function horizon(){ return Hh*0.72; }

function drawScene(t){
  /* sky */
  var g=cx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,Hh);
  g.addColorStop(0,'#04050c'); g.addColorStop(0.55,'#0a1024'); g.addColorStop(0.72,'#141d38'); g.addColorStop(1,'#060a16');
  cx.fillStyle=g; cx.fillRect(0,0,W,Hh);
  /* stars */
  stars.forEach(function(st){ var a=0.35+0.35*Math.sin(t/900+st.tw);
    cx.globalAlpha=a; cx.fillStyle=WHITE; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(st.x*W,st.y*Hh,st.r,0,6.28); cx.fill(); });
  cx.globalAlpha=1;
  /* crescent moon */
  var mx=W*0.82,my=Hh*0.16,mr=Math.min(W,Hh)*0.055;
  cx.save(); cx.shadowColor='rgba(244,248,255,.8)'; cx.shadowBlur=30;
  cx.fillStyle='#f2ecd8'; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(mx,my,mr,0,6.28); cx.fill(); cx.restore();
  cx.fillStyle='#0a1024'; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(mx-mr*0.42,my-mr*0.18,mr*0.92,0,6.28); cx.fill();
  var hz=horizon();
  /* water */
  var wg=cx.createLinearGradient(0,hz,0,Hh);
  wg.addColorStop(0,'#0e1c34'); wg.addColorStop(1,'#04070f');
  cx.fillStyle=wg; cx.fillRect(0,hz,W,Hh-hz);
  /* moon glint */
  cx.globalAlpha=0.12; cx.fillStyle='#f2ecd8';
  for(var gy=hz+8; gy<Hh; gy+=9) cx.fillRect(mx-mr*(0.5+Math.random()*0.4), gy, mr*(1+Math.random()), 1.6);
  cx.globalAlpha=1;
  /* the fleet, at anchor in the night harbor */
  if(fleetCv){
    /* FULL BLEED: scale to COVER the whole canvas (fill W and H, crop overflow) */
    var ir=fleetCv.width/fleetCv.height, cr=W/Hh, fw, fh;
    if(cr>ir){ fw=W; fh=W/ir; } else { fh=Hh; fw=Hh*ir; }   /* cover, not contain */
    var fx=(W-fw)/2, fy=(Hh-fh)/2;                          /* center the crop */
    cx.globalAlpha=0.7;
    cx.drawImage(fleetCv, fx, fy, fw, fh);
    cx.globalAlpha=1;
  }
  /* drawn mini-ships retired — the real fleet photograph holds the harbor */
  /* smoke drift */
  smoke.forEach(function(sm){ sm.x+=sm.dx/600; if(sm.x>1.2)sm.x=-0.2; if(sm.x<-0.2)sm.x=1.2;
    var sg=cx.createRadialGradient(sm.x*W,sm.y*Hh,0,sm.x*W,sm.y*Hh,sm.r);
    sg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(120,130,160,'+sm.a+')'); sg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(120,130,160,0)');
    cx.fillStyle=sg; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(sm.x*W,sm.y*Hh,sm.r,0,6.28); cx.fill(); });
}

var SIGILS=['A','K','\u2640','\u2642','\u2725','\u25C8'];
function ships(t,hz){
  var n=6;
  for(var i=0;i<n;i++){
    var sx=W*(0.10+i*0.155)+Math.sin(t/1700+i*2)*3, bob=Math.sin(t/1200+i)*2.2;
    var sy=hz+6+bob, hw=W*0.052, mh=Hh*0.14;
    /* hull */
    cx.fillStyle='#0d0a08';
    cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(sx-hw,sy); cx.lineTo(sx+hw,sy); cx.lineTo(sx+hw*0.7,sy+12); cx.lineTo(sx-hw*0.7,sy+12); cx.closePath(); cx.fill();
    cx.strokeStyle='rgba(232,199,102,.5)'; cx.lineWidth=1; cx.strokeRect(sx-hw*0.25,sy+2,hw*0.5,6);
    /* mast + sail */
    cx.strokeStyle='#1a120c'; cx.lineWidth=3;
    cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(sx,sy); cx.lineTo(sx,sy-mh); cx.stroke();
    cx.fillStyle='#0b0b10';
    cx.fillRect(sx-hw*0.8, sy-mh, hw*1.6, mh*0.72);
    cx.strokeStyle='rgba(244,248,255,.18)'; cx.strokeRect(sx-hw*0.8, sy-mh, hw*1.6, mh*0.72);
    /* glowing sigil */
    cx.save(); cx.shadowColor=GOLD; cx.shadowBlur=12; cx.fillStyle='#f7e6ad';
    cx.font='bold '+Math.round(mh*0.34)+'px "Share Tech Mono",monospace'; cx.textAlign='center'; cx.textBaseline='middle';
    cx.fillText(SIGILS[i%SIGILS.length], sx, sy-mh+mh*0.36); cx.restore();
    /* reflection */
    cx.save(); cx.globalAlpha=0.16; cx.translate(0, (sy+12)*2); cx.scale(1,-1);
    cx.fillStyle='#0b0b10'; cx.fillRect(sx-hw*0.8, sy-mh, hw*1.6, mh*0.72);
    cx.restore();
  }
}

/* ---------- fireworks: NAMES fired into the sky ---------- */
var rockets=[], bursts=[];
function launch(){
  var name=NAMES[ni++ % NAMES.length];
  var x0=W*(0.15+Math.random()*0.7);
  rockets.push({ name:name, x:x0, y:horizon()-4, vx:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.6, vy:-(Hh*0.0042+Math.random()*Hh*0.0016),
    color:PALETTE[Math.floor(Math.random()*3)], apex:Hh*(0.16+Math.random()*0.22), trail:[] });
}
function explode(r){
  var parts=[]; var N=130+Math.random()*70|0;
  for(var i=0;i<N;i++){ var a=Math.random()*6.283;
    var conf=Math.random()<0.55;                              /* ~half confetti flakes, half sparks */
    var sp = conf? 1.0+Math.random()*3.2 : 2.2+Math.random()*4.6; /* sparks streak out faster (crackle) */
    parts.push({x:r.x,y:r.y,vx:Math.cos(a)*sp,vy:Math.sin(a)*sp,life:1,
      c:PALETTE[Math.floor(Math.random()*3)], conf:conf,
      w: conf? 2.2+Math.random()*2.8 : 0.8+Math.random()*1.5,  /* flake width / spark radius */
      h: 1.4+Math.random()*2.4,
      rot: Math.random()*6.283, vr:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.42,   /* tumble */
      sway: Math.random()*6.283, swaySp: 0.07+Math.random()*0.12, /* flutter phase/speed */
      fade: conf? 0.006+Math.random()*0.004 : 0.016+Math.random()*0.014 }); }
  bursts.push({parts:parts, name:r.name, x:r.x, y:r.y, flash:1, nameLife:1, age:0});
}
var last=0, lastLaunch=0;
function frame(t){
  drawScene(t);
  if(t-lastLaunch> (1100+Math.random()*700)){ launch(); lastLaunch=t; }
  /* rockets: a glowing name climbing on a spark trail */
  cx.textAlign='center';
  rockets=rockets.filter(function(r){
    r.x+=r.vx; r.y+=r.vy; r.vy+=0.012;
    r.trail.push({x:r.x,y:r.y});
    if(r.trail.length>22)r.trail.shift();
    /* tracer: tapered luminous streak, additive */
    cx.save(); cx.globalCompositeOperation='lighter'; cx.lineCap='round';
    for(var ti=1;ti<r.trail.length;ti++){
      var p0=r.trail[ti-1], p1=r.trail[ti], tf=ti/r.trail.length;
      cx.strokeStyle='rgba(232,199,102,'+(tf*0.55).toFixed(3)+')';
      cx.lineWidth=tf*3.2;
      cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(p0.x,p0.y); cx.lineTo(p1.x,p1.y); cx.stroke();
    }
    var hN=r.trail.length;                                  /* white-hot core */
    if(hN>2){ var pa=r.trail[hN-2], pb=r.trail[hN-1];
      cx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.9)'; cx.lineWidth=1.4;
      cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(pa.x,pa.y); cx.lineTo(pb.x,pb.y); cx.stroke(); }
    cx.restore();
    if(Math.random()<0.3){ cx.globalAlpha=0.7; cx.fillStyle=GOLD;   /* shed sparks */
      cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(r.x+(Math.random()-0.5)*4, r.y+6+Math.random()*6, 0.9,0,6.28); cx.fill(); cx.globalAlpha=1; }
    /* the name — smaller + SHARP: dark outline, crisp fill, no blur */
    cx.font='600 10px "Share Tech Mono",monospace';
    cx.lineWidth=2.5; cx.strokeStyle='rgba(4,5,12,.85)';
    cx.strokeText(r.name, r.x, r.y-7);
    cx.fillStyle=r.color; cx.fillText(r.name, r.x, r.y-7);
    if(r.y<=r.apex){ explode(r); return false; }
    return true;
  });
  /* bursts: the name flashes huge, then rains red/white/blue */
  bursts=bursts.filter(function(b){
    b.age=(b.age||0)+1;
    if(b.flash>0){ cx.save(); cx.globalCompositeOperation='lighter'; cx.fillStyle=WHITE;
      cx.globalAlpha=b.flash*0.55;                             /* soft bloom halo */
      cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(b.x,b.y,(1-b.flash)*74+12,0,6.28); cx.fill();
      cx.globalAlpha=b.flash*b.flash*0.95;                     /* hot quick core */
      cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(b.x,b.y,(1-b.flash)*20+5,0,6.28); cx.fill();
      cx.restore(); b.flash-=0.07; }
    if(b.nameLife>0){ cx.save(); cx.globalAlpha=Math.min(1,b.nameLife*1.4);
      cx.shadowColor=WHITE; cx.shadowBlur=18; cx.fillStyle=WHITE;
      cx.font='800 '+Math.round(16+(1-b.nameLife)*14)+'px "Amenti Display","Special Elite",cursive';
      cx.fillText(b.name, b.x, b.y - (1-b.nameLife)*24); cx.restore(); b.nameLife-=0.012; }
    var alive=false;
    var k=Math.max(0,Math.min(1,((b.age||0)-16)/10));          /* bloom ~16 frames, then gravity+flutter ramp in */
    b.parts.forEach(function(p){ if(p.life<=0)return; alive=true;
      if(p.conf){                                              /* confetti flake: bloom out, THEN flutter down */
        p.sway+=p.swaySp;
        p.vy+=0.030*k;                                         /* gravity only after the bloom */
        p.vx*=(0.992-0.017*k);                                 /* light drag mid-bloom → heavier as it falls */
        p.x+=p.vx+Math.cos(p.sway)*0.9*k; p.y+=p.vy;           /* flutter fades in with k */
        p.rot+=p.vr*(0.3+0.7*k); p.life-=p.fade;
        var hh=p.h*(0.35+0.65*Math.abs(Math.cos(p.sway)));     /* foreshorten as it tumbles */
        cx.save(); cx.globalAlpha=Math.max(p.life,0);
        cx.translate(p.x,p.y); cx.rotate(p.rot);
        cx.fillStyle=p.c; cx.fillRect(-p.w/2,-hh/2,p.w,hh); cx.restore();
      } else {                                                 /* spark: streak out (crackle), then arc + twinkle */
        p.vy+=0.05*k; p.vx*=0.985; p.x+=p.vx; p.y+=p.vy; p.life-=p.fade;
        cx.save(); cx.globalCompositeOperation='lighter';
        cx.globalAlpha=Math.max(p.life,0)*(0.6+Math.random()*0.4);
        cx.fillStyle=p.c; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.w,0,6.28); cx.fill(); cx.restore();
      } });
    cx.globalAlpha=1;
    return alive || b.nameLife>0 || b.flash>0;
  });
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
}
requestAnimationFrame(frame);
})();

</script>
</body></html>
